title: KonoSuba: God's Blessing on This Wonderful World
description: KonoSuba, a God's blessing on this wonderful Minecraft world. Dungeons, bosses, magic and Megumin's hat, what more could you want?
body:
![KonoSuba SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/68FlS3RJ/images/c069661794501249ac9ac30086c6262b3f231dfb.png)
# Overview
**KonoSuba: God's Blessing on This Wonderful World** is a fantasy/adventure based modpack. This pack is packed full of magic, monsters, dungeons, walking npc's and more... From the peak of explosions to the depths of sea monsters, jump into the Minecraft version of KonoSuba.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/konosuba)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/konosuba)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Powered Up World Generation** - From mystic trees to magic forests, explore the bounty of the lands.
- [✔️] **Magic Nd More** - It's not minecraft if it doesn't have magic, from explosion spells to gravity spells, a crimson demons life awaits.
- [✔️] **Food And Farming** - Nothing says a good life like food, from the festive winters to the scorching summers, plant your crops year round.

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
